name: Nandini Goel
bio: I'm a passionate Full Stack Developer from India pursuing B.Tech in Computer Science (AIML) at ABES Engineering College, Ghaziabad. I build elegant, high-performance web applications using the MERN stack while exploring the frontiers of Artificial Intelligence. I believe great code is both functional and beautiful.
availability: Open to internships and full-time opportunities

education.degree: B.Tech in Computer Science & Engineering (AIML specialization)
highlights: Active in coding clubs and hackathons

experience.description: Won Smart India Hackathon 2024 — the largest national-level hackathon organized by the Government of India. Built a scalable, impactful tech solution as part of a team, competing against thousands of teams nationwide.
Developed and deployed the TES v4.0 web platform — a responsive events site used by thousands of students. Implemented clean UI design and optimized user experience.

projects.name: Mentor Map
projects.tagline: Connecting students with the right mentors — instantly.
projects.description: A full-featured platform connecting students and mentees with experienced mentors for career advice, guidance, and networking. Built responsive and accessible UI components with TailwindCSS, dynamically converting Figma designs into pixel-perfect interfaces. Integrated REST APIs for real-time mentor recommendations and discovery flows.
projects.impact: Helps students find mentors based on domain, skills, and availability

projects.name: TES-4.0
projects.tagline: Modern web experience for a technical events platform.
projects.description: Developed and deployed TES v4 — a fully responsive web application for ABES Engineering College's technical events society. Used modern frontend technologies with CI/CD pipeline on Vercel. Implemented clean UI design and optimized user experience with efficient component structure.
projects.impact: Used by thousands of students for event registrations and announcements

projects.name: Portfolio Website
projects.description: An interactive, 3D and glassmorphism-styled personal portfolio website built with React, Framer Motion, and Three.js / React Three Fiber. Features a custom cursor, scroll animations, dark/light theme toggle, and an AI-powered chatbot assistant. Fully responsive and deployed.
projects.impact: Showcases all skills and projects to recruiters and the developer community

achievements: 🏆 Winner — Smart India Hackathon 2024 (National Level, Government of India)
🚀 Successfully deployed TES-4.0 used by thousands of students
💡 Built and deployed a 3D interactive developer portfolio with AI chatbot
📚 Strong foundation in DSA — consistently practices problem solving
🎓 Pursuing B.Tech in CS (AIML) with active participation in tech communities
personalityTraits: Detail-oriented and passionate about clean, scalable code
Strong problem-solver with a competitive DSA mindset
Loves building things that look great AND work great
Team player — proven by hackathon wins
Continuously learning — always exploring new technologies
